headline: Trump 🍊💰 CRYPTO MOONS $1B+ 🪙🚀 meme coin BAG secured!
text: Trump 🍊👑 just printed MORE THAN $1 BILLION 🤑💵 from CRYPTO last year, making his meme coin 🪙💥 and World Liberty Financial 🏦💎 the BIGGEST FLEX ever! His 927-page 📜📑 disclosure dropped $635M in royalties from the Trump meme coin that LAUNCHED days before office but has since PLUNGED 📉😭 like a crypto winter nightmare. Still, the ORANGE MAN keeps raking it in with over $500M from the sons' and Witkoff kids' crypto venture, proving the family is all in on the DIGITAL GOLD RUSH ⛏️💰. Meanwhile, Mar-a-Lago 🏰🍸 pulled $77M, Doral golf ⛳🏌️‍♂️ raked $122M, and other clubs in Bedminster, Jupiter, Turnberry 🏌️‍♂️🌍 added tens of millions more. Trump-branded watches ⌚💎, Bibles 📖🙏, trainers 👟, fragrances 🧴, and guitars 🎸 dropped another $4.7M in royalties while Melania's doc license 📽️💸 scored her $10.7M and NFT sales 🖼️💰 added $6M. Lawsuit settlements from ABC 📺, CBS 📡, Meta 📘, YouTube ▶️, and X 🐦 pumped in another $86.5M, most headed to his future presidential library 📚🏛️. White House says NO CONFLICTS OF INTEREST 🚫🤥, just making America the CRYPTO CAPITAL 🌎🔥 of the world, even though Trump once called Bitcoin a SCAM 🗣️💩. Forbes says his fortune is now $6B 💼📈, Bloomberg says $7.6B 🤑📊. With Paul Atkins at SEC flipping the script from regulation to celebration, and the GENIUS Act signed to make America the undisputed DIGITAL ASSETS KING 👑💻, Trump is living his best crypto dad life while the haters recycle the same tired narrative for a decade. The meme coin may have tanked but the PRESIDENT'S WALLET is still going BRRRRRRR 🤑🔥!
